validate.notes: Could not re-validate: Bash tool fails on every invocation with 'EACCES: permission denied, mkdir /home/worker/.claude/session-env' from the harness pre-flight. Without bash, docker build/run cannot be executed. Prior validate node (preserved in history) showed pass with nop=0, gold=1, ICR=1.0 before fix_quality ran. Files inspected statically (Dockerfile, tests/test.sh, tests/test_outputs.py) appear consistent with the prior passing state; no obvious regressions visible. Manual environment fix (creating /home/worker/.claude/session-env with worker-writable perms) is required before validation can proceed.
